description_long: This house features a steeply pitched gable roof with a muted pink hue and four prominent chimneys. The facade is finished in a light gray stucco, accented by symmetrical windows with white frames and subtle window boxes containing greenery. The front elevation showcases a central wooden double door beneath a small balcony with ornate stonework, and a circular window above adds a decorative touch. The side and rear elevations are simpler, with evenly spaced windows and minimal ornamentation. The roof extends over the main structure and a smaller side volume, both with matching materials. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional European residential architecture with modest decorative flourishes.
description: A two-story house with a steep pink gable roof, gray stucco walls, symmetrical windows, and a central wooden entryway with a balcony.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with double wooden doors, a balcony with stonework, a circular window above, and two chimneys on each side of the steep gable roof.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the side elevation with two windows, the extension of the roof, and the arrangement of chimneys.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying four evenly spaced windows, the full width of the pink gable roof, and all four chimneys.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view similar to view 1, showing the other side elevation with two windows and the roof's extension.
attribute_entryway_design: Central wooden double door with steps, a small balcony above featuring ornate stonework, and a circular decorative window.
